title: Link/URL to copy which take you to a Workspace or Folders
excerpt:
It would helps in some instances to provide someone with a link to a workspace, folder or subfolders. 
Is this on the roadmap at all it would save so much time.

posts.author: rosalind (Rosalind Guy)
